system.description:
### Tier 1 Ranged These soldiers function with determined precision and practiced teamwork Motives & Tactics: Acquire, cover, eliminate

#### Features Tactical Cover - Reaction: Mark 1 Stress to gain +2 Difficulty against a ranged attack if near cover.

Smoke Grenade - Action: Creates a Very Close area that grants Disadvantage to all ranged attack rolls made into or out of the area. }}

{{adversary,
